event: family history of testicular cancer in brother
peritoneal lesions from perforated mucinous cystadenoma of appendix
decided on IVF and embryo cryopreservation
extended disease spread in Douglas pouch, omentum, diaphragm, spleen, ovaries, appendix, uterus
lesions peeled off uterus, uterus left intact
postoperative heated intraperitoneal mitomycin C infusions
numerous small peritoneal lesions, left diaphragm lesion, posterior uterine wall lesion
desire to become pregnant at age 37
endometrium preparation with E2 valerate (2 mg tid)
vaginal micronized progesterone (200 mg tid) added
deep vein thrombosis (DVT) diagnosed at 21 weeks gestation
left flank pain at 28 weeks gestation
Betamethasone course for fetal lung maturation
abdominal ultrasound showed mild bilateral hydronephrosis
Doppler ruled out renal vein thrombosis
left flank pain recurrence at 32 weeks gestation
vaginal delivery of male neonate (1,545 g)
postpartum hemorrhage requiring 2 packed cell infusions
